info.description:
**Quick Face Engine REST API**

Provides face detection, recognition, and database management capabilities.

---

**Response Format**

All endpoints return JSON with the following structure:
```json
{
"success": true,
"error_code": 0,
"msg": "Operation completed",
"data": { ... }
}
```

- `success`: Operation result (true/false)
- `error_code`: 0 = success, negative = error (see QFE_RET_CODE)
- `msg`: Human-readable message
- `data`: Response payload
info.title: QFE REST API

post.description: Performs face detection and head pose estimation in a single API call. Accepts raw image data with dimensions.
post.summary: Face detection and head pose estimation (All-in-One)

get.description: Gets the current automatic template update mode setting.

post.description: Sets the automatic template update mode for enrolled faces during identification.
Deletes a user and their enrolled face templates from the face database.
Detects all faces in the provided image and returns face locations with 5-point landmarks.
Enrolls a face from an image to the face database with a user ID. Used for 1:N identification.
Enrolls a user using a pre-extracted template instead of an image.
Extracts a face recognition template (feature vector) from an image containing a face.
Estimates face attributes including age, gender, emotion, glasses, and ethnicity from a face image.
Estimates head pose angles (yaw, pitch, roll) from a face image. Range is approximately ±90 degrees.
Identifies a face from an image by comparing against all enrolled faces in the database.
Identifies a face using a pre-extracted template instead of an image.

get.description: Returns basic information about the QFE SDK including version, status, and initialization details.
Loads system parameters from the default configuration file (system_parameter.cfg).

post.description: Detects whether a person is wearing a mask in the provided face image.
Compares two face recognition templates and returns a similarity score for 1:1 verification.
Performs end-to-end face matching on two images. Extracts templates from both images and compares them.

get.description: Gets the current face matching threshold value used for verification and identification.

post.description: Sets the face matching threshold value used for verification and identification decisions.

get.description: Gets the current maximum number of faces that will be detected in a single image.

post.description: Sets the maximum number of faces that will be detected in a single image.

get.description: Gets the maximum number of SDK instances allowed by license and current active instance count.

post.description: Performs multi-face detection without identity matching. Returns detection results including bounding boxes, landmarks, image quality, and warped face images.
Resets all system parameters to default values.
Saves current system parameters to the default configuration file (system_parameter.cfg).

get.description: Returns the total number of templates in the database.
Exports the template for a specific user and sub_id.
Returns the number of templates for a specific user.
Returns a list of all user IDs enrolled in the face database.

delete.description: Deletes all enrolled users from the face database. Use with caution.

get.description: Returns the total number of enrolled users in the database.

post.description: Validates image quality based on blur detection, luminance, face positioning, and head pose criteria.
Performs 1:1 face verification against a specific enrolled user.

parameters.description: Face image and target user ID
parameters.name: request

post.description: Performs 1:1 verification of a template against a specific enrolled user.

get.description: Returns the health status of the API server and QFE SDK. Used for monitoring and load balancer health checks.
Returns server statistics including memory usage, request counts, and concurrency information.

msg.example: Auto template update mode retrieved successfully
